name: Rabbit Terrine
recipeInstructions:
1. Serve with French bread, butter lettuce, and Dijon mustard.
2. Cut all possible meat off rabbit and mix with diced pork. Place in food processor fitted with a steel blade. Process until ground roughly.
3. Place in bowl and add all remaining ingredients except bacon. Return to processor and process again until finely ground. Return to bowl and mix well with hands.
4. Drape bacon strips over sides and bottom of a 9-inch x 5-inch (23 x 1.5 cm) loaf pan. Press meat mixture into pan, smooth top, and fold bacon ends over top.
5. Place loaf pan in water bath with water half-way up the sides of the pan. Bake at 350 degrees F. (180 C) for 1 1/4 hours.
6. Remove from loaf pan and let cool.
7. Wrap and refrigerate until serving time. Serve, sliced, with crusty bread, butter lettuce, salad, and Dijon mustard on the side.
